message:
perf(types,vdbe,core): Arc<str> value fixes, set_reg_int fast paths, compile cache optimization

- Fix as_text()/as_blob() for Arc<str>/Arc<[u8]> SqliteValue (use deref
  coercion instead of unstable as_str()/as_slice() methods)
- Fix SmallVec extend_from_slice for non-Copy SqliteValue (use iter().cloned())
- Restore set_reg_int fast paths on integer-producing opcodes (BitAnd,
  BitOr, BitNot, AddImm, Compare STOREP2, Not) — skips NaN check
- Eliminate AST clone in compile cache key: compiled_select.to_string()
  instead of Statement::Select(x.clone()).to_string()
- Gate decode_record to #[cfg(test)] (dead code after IdxLE refactor)
- Fix Cargo.toml workspace dependency overrides
- Format fixes from cargo fmt

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -7,6 +7,11 @@ license-file.workspace = true
 repository.workspace = true
 rust-version.workspace = true
 
+[features]
+default = ["native"]
+native = ["fsqlite-pager/native", "fsqlite-wal/native"]
+wasm = ["fsqlite-pager/wasm", "fsqlite-wal/wasm"]
+
 [dependencies]
 blake3 = { workspace = true }
 crossbeam-epoch = { workspace = true }

@@ -7,6 +7,11 @@ license-file.workspace = true
 repository.workspace = true
 rust-version.workspace = true
 
+[features]
+default = ["native"]
+native = ["fsqlite-types/native", "fsqlite-vfs/native"]
+wasm = ["fsqlite-types/wasm", "fsqlite-vfs/wasm"]
+
 [dependencies]
 foldhash = "0.1"
 smallvec = { version = "1.13.2", features = ["const_generics", "union", "const_new"] }

@@ -7,6 +7,11 @@ license-file.workspace = true
 repository.workspace = true
 rust-version.workspace = true
 
+[features]
+default = ["native"]
+native = []
+wasm = []
+
 [dependencies]
 fsqlite-types = { workspace = true }
 fsqlite-error = { workspace = true }

@@ -7,6 +7,11 @@ license-file.workspace = true
 repository.workspace = true
 rust-version.workspace = true
 
+[features]
+default = ["native"]
+native = ["fsqlite-types/native", "fsqlite-vfs/native"]
+wasm = ["fsqlite-types/wasm", "fsqlite-vfs/wasm"]
+
 [dependencies]
 fsqlite-types = { workspace = true }
 fsqlite-error = { workspace = true }
